response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: N/A (no audio). 2. JSON Usage: Fully manual translation of the on-screen text as there is no vocal audio. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed each line of the handwritten farewell message sequentially from 00:00 to 00:30 to allow comfortable reading, leaving the rest of the silent video unsubtitled.

subtitles.original: 最後までみてくれてありがとう☆＝
subtitles.english: Thank you for watching until the very end! ☆=

subtitles.original: これからも私は私らしく、
subtitles.english: From now on, I will continue to be true to myself,

subtitles.original: みんなと共にあります。

subtitles.english: Continuing to take on new challenges,

subtitles.original: まだ見ぬ世界を見に行こう！
subtitles.english: let's go see worlds we've never seen before!
